'''Naftrat Odarr''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] research and development officer who, like most Sullustans, originally worked for [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Because of Odarr's engineering expertise (and dissatisfaction with the company), agents from [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] were able to provide suitable enticement to defect. Odarr was promptly put to work finding new uses and modifications for the popular [[PK-series worker droid/Legends|PK-series worker droid]]. The result was the [[Recon-PK series droid|Recon-PK series]], perfect for corporate and military espionage. The droids found less savory use among slave-owners in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="WTS" />
